title: MitoTracker staining of fibroblasts
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2sasr","text":"This protocol describes the procedure for visualizing mitochondria in fibroblasts with MitoTracker used in the Seifert Lab.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Culture cells in DMEM and Hams F-12 50/50 Fisher Scientific Catalog #MT10090CV supplemented with 10% FBS (HyClone) Contributed by users and 1% Antibiotic/Antimycotic (100X) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #15240062 at 37 °C under 3% O 2 and 5% CO 2 in Tissue culture dish (10 cm) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Z707651 for 48:00:00
Seed fibroblasts in 24 well plates on cover slips at 5,000 cells per well
Remove media
Wash cells with warm HBSS Thermo Fisher Scientific
Follow this procedure for MitoTracker Red staining and fixed cell imaging
Add 0.3 μL/mL MitoTracker® Red CMXRos Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #9082 in FBS-free DMEM for 00:30:00
Wash cells twice with 1X PBS Contributed by users
Fix for 00:15:00 in the dark with warm 4% Formaldehyde, Methanol-Free Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #47746
Remove formaldehyde and wash cells twice with 1X PBS Contributed by users for 00:05:00
Add 500 µL chilled Acetone Fisher Scientific Catalog #A18P-4 (CAS: 67-64-1) to each well and incubate for 00:05:00
Remove acetone and wash cells once with 1X PBS Contributed by users

Add DAPI (4,6-diamidino-2-phenylindole, dihydrochloride) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #D1306 diluted 1:2,000 in HBSS Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #14170-112 to each well and incubate for 00:15:00
Remove DAPI solution and wash cells with Sterile deionized H2O Contributed by users
Air dry coverslips
Mount on glass slides with Prolong Gold Antifade Mountant Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #P36930
Follow this procedure for MitoTracker Green staining and live cell imaging
Incubate cells in staining mix in FBS-free DMEM for 00:30:00
Wash cells once with HBSS Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #14170-112
Prepare mix by adding 2 µL of MitoTracker Green FM Cell Signaling Technology Catalog #9047S to 12 mL and warming
Live Image immediately. Cells should be cultured in Cellvis 24 Well glass bottom plate with high performance #1.5 cover glass # NC0397150 for optimal imaging.
creator: Ashley Seifert
